description_long: This is a wide-brimmed, light taupe hat with a structured, pinched crown and a flat, expansive brim. The crown features a gentle crease at the top and a subtle pinch at the front, giving it a classic, slightly western silhouette. A thin, matching hatband encircles the base of the crown, tied in a simple knot on one side for understated decoration. The brim is broad, flat, and uniform in width, providing ample shade and a stylish profile. The material appears to be a tightly woven, semi-soft fabric, likely felt or straw, with a matte finish. There are no visible logos or additional embellishments, making the design clean and versatile for urban wear.
description: A wide-brimmed, taupe hat with a pinched crown and a simple hatband, crafted from a matte, woven material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pinched crown, wide flat brim, and the hatband knot on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, flat brim and the smooth, unadorned side of the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and brim, with the hatband knot barely visible on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the hatband knot and the continuous flat brim.
